onClick.description: Primary action handler (supports async loading state)

items.description: Menu items: { label, icon?, onClick?, disabled?, danger?, divider?, shortcut? }

variant.description: Color variant applied to both halves

leftIcon.description: Icon on the left side of the primary button

rightIcon.description: Icon on the right side of the primary button

loading.description: Show loading spinner on the primary button

menuPlacement.description: Preferred menu placement (auto-flips when out of viewport)

menuWidth.description: Menu width: 'trigger' matches the SplitButton, 'auto' fits content, or a px number

triggerIcon.description: Icon used on the secondary trigger (default chevron-down)

ariaLabel.description: Accessible label for the trigger (default: 'More {label} actions')
